streaming_calculation.base_formula: quality * playlist_access * reputation * marketing * popularity * rng
streaming_calculation._variance_range_note: First-week streaming RNG variance band. Deliberately kept HERE (streaming_calculation) rather than reusing economy.json rng_variance to avoid cross-file semantic coupling between streaming variance and any future economy-level variance use (balance-integrity slice 1).

energy_effectiveness._note: Balance-integrity slice 5: artist energy multiplies tour sell-through BEFORE the 1.0 cap. energyFactor = min + (max-min)*(energy/100), linear in energy. Default energy 50 -> 0.975 (a rested act sells the room harder; a run-down one doesn't). enabled:false short-circuits to factor 1.0.

energy_cost._note: C87: each tour city drains this much artist energy on reveal, accumulated into summary.artistChanges and clamped 0-100 by ArtistStateProcessor. Flat per city. enabled:false short-circuits to 0. Counterweight to energy_effectiveness. No passive energy recovery exists, so the road cost is permanent until a meeting restores it. Round-2 tuning (2026-07-12): 6 -> 9, tours drain hardest by designer directive.

energy_lifecycle._note: Volatility-economy slice 1: passive artist-energy lifecycle, the counterweight to the C87 tour drain (which lives in tour_revenue.energy_cost). recording_drain_per_week: an artist with any recording-type project (Single/EP) in the 'production' stage loses this much energy that week ('from the studio'). idle_recovery_per_week: an artist with NO active project — no Mini-Tour in production, no recording project in production — recovers this much ('a week to breathe'), clamped to 0-100 downstream in ArtistStateProcessor. Flat, arithmetic-only, zero RNG. enabled:false short-circuits BOTH to 0. Accumulated into summary.artistChanges like the tour drain; the DB write + clamp happen in ArtistStateProcessor.applyArtistChangesToDatabase. Round-2 tuning (2026-07-12): recording_drain 4 -> 5, idle_recovery 3 -> 2 (recovery playtested as too strong).

breakthrough_effects._artist_mood_bonus_note: Volatility-economy slice 2: when a song breaks through (the public catches on harder than expected), its artist gets a morale lift. Applied to summary.artistChanges[song.artistId].mood at the breakthrough site in ReleaseProcessor, clamped 0-100 downstream. Zero RNG (the breakthrough roll itself is the existing deterministic sin-seed).

release_promotion._note: Engine-verbs arc slice 8 (M5 promote_release). The authored effect value is an awareness-point bump applied to the targeted currently-released song (highest-awareness released song for the targeted artist, or label-wide). Clamped per application by max_awareness_bump, and the song's awareness stays within 0-100. Decay fields are never touched — the bump rides the existing weekly build/decay cycle.

catalog_damage._note: Engine-verbs arc slice 8 (M12 catalog_damage). The authored effect value is a severity (positive number); the targeted released song loses awareness * min(max_total_fraction, severity * awareness_loss_fraction_per_severity). Lower awareness directly reduces the song's future streaming revenue (weeks 5+ awareness modifier in FinancialSystem.calculateDecayRevenue). peak_awareness is historical and never reduced.

physical_inventory._note: Engine-verbs arc slice 10 (M9 physical_inventory flags-ledger MVP). grant_inventory's authored value is a unit count (clamped to max_units_per_grant); unit economics come from these knobs. Manufacturing cost (units * unit_cost) is charged at grant time. Each week a DETERMINISTIC sell-through converts units to revenue at unit_price: sold = round(unitsInitial * base_weekly_sell_rate * (1 + awareness/100 * awareness_sell_rate_bonus_max)), floored at min_weekly_units while stock remains, capped at unitsRemaining. Awareness = the tied release's highest song awareness that week. Unsold units expire as a one-time write-off line after shelf_life_weeks.

revenue_transfer._note: Engine-verbs arc slice 10 (M11 revenue_stream_transfer flags-ledger MVP). transfer_revenue_stream's authored value is the sold fraction of the targeted released release's weekly streaming revenue (values >= 1 are read as percent). Clamped to max_fraction. The deduction runs for default_weeks weeks from the grant week, then the ledger entry retires.
